title: Sarala Temple
tagline: Sarala Temple — spiritual town of Odisha

overview.short: The Maa Sarala Temple (also known as Jhankad Sarala Temple) is a Hindu temple in the district of Jagatsinghpur, Odisha, India, dedicated to Goddess Adishakti.
overview.description: The Maa Sarala Temple (also known as Jhankad Sarala Temple) is a Hindu temple in the district of Jagatsinghpur, Odisha, India, dedicated to Goddess Adishakti.

topPlaces.name: Utkal Plains
topPlaces.description: The Utkal Plain is part of the Eastern Coastal Plain of India. It is a coastal plain in the Odisha state of eastern India.

items.note: The Utkal Plain is part of the Eastern Coastal Plain of India. It is a coastal plain in the Odisha state of eastern India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Sarala Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Sarala Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Sarala Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Biju Patnaik International Airport, Bhubaneswar (81 km) and the nearest railway station is Bhubaneswar Railway Station (78 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Sarala Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Sarala Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Sarala Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Sarala Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Sarala Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Utkal Plains.
